name: codex_rollout_drift_summary
primary_question: What bounded drift and rollback posture is represented by the latest pointer inside the checked-in trusted owner history without replacing source-owned campaign truth?
derivation_rule: derive the historical drift window, drift state, explicit repair-attempt posture, and descriptive rollback requirement from the exact four checked-in 8Dionysus rollout-history surfaces
authority_ceiling: Weaker than source-owned drift reviews, rollback windows, and campaign history.
